# Support

For repository issues, open a normal GitHub issue.

For focused paid help with STM32 bring-up, UART/DMA, PWM, display work, sensor/radar experiments, flashing/debug setup, serial logs, board wiring, or prototype reliability:

- Review page: https://x2.brucelu.top/iot/?source=github-support-stm32-learn-proj
- Sample review: https://x2.brucelu.top/iot/sample/?source=github-support-stm32-learn-proj
- Ask first: https://x2.brucelu.top/products/contact/?offer=iot&source=github-support-stm32-learn-proj
- Checkout: https://x2.brucelu.top/iot/checkout/?source=github-support-stm32-learn-proj
